title: Bruce Maxwell Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Bruce Maxwell Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Bruce Maxwell
Khoury Faculty
Seattle Campus
When Bruce Maxwell’s sixth grade teacher brought an Apple One into class, he had to know how it worked. That excitement for new technologies has guided him through his career, and now he finds joy in teaching students who will shape the field’s future.
It’s just fun to be part of something where you are continually learning, continually having to innovate … I really enjoy being a professor because I get to watch my students go out and do amazing things
Bruce Maxwell, Assistant Director of Computing Programs – Seattle
Explore all Khoury Stories
